handlers.name: EjectEntityHandler
handlers.description: Handles ejection of entities (actors) from vehicles. Used when a unit dismounts or is forced to exit a vehicle.

handler_fields.description: Reference to the parent skill (inherited from SkillEventHandler)
Pointer to the effect data template containing configuration

effect_data_fields.name: AllowRemount
effect_data_fields.description: If true, allows the ejected unit to re-enter vehicles. If false, validates target must be an entrance tile.

effect_data_fields.name: RemountSkillTemplate
effect_data_fields.description: Skill template granted to the ejected actor enabling remounting capability

behavior.on_use: Validates target tile, moves actor or teleports entity and passengers. If AllowRemount=true, sets turn not done and grants RemountSkillTemplate.
behavior.target_validation: Checks tile is empty, not impassable, movement not blocked. If AllowRemount=false, tile must be a valid entrance tile.
behavior.is_hidden: Returns true if entity has no default attribute (no passenger)
behavior.is_usable: Returns true if entity has passenger and entrance tile is not blocked

handlers.name: DropRecoverableObjectHandler
handlers.description: Handles dropping and recovering objective objects. Used for VIP extraction, intel recovery, or similar pickup/dropoff objectives.

handler_fields.description: Reference to the parent skill (inherited from SkillEventHandler)
Pointer to the effect data template containing configuration

handler_fields.name: AllowAllies
handler_fields.description: If true, allied units can also pick up/drop the object

handler_fields.name: RecoverObjective
handler_fields.description: Reference to the RecoverObject objective tracking this item

effect_data_fields.name: TileEffectTemplate
effect_data_fields.description: Template for creating the RecoverableObjectTileEffectHandler when object is dropped

effect_data_fields.name: HUDIcon
effect_data_fields.description: Icon displayed on unit HUD when carrying the object

behavior.on_added: Adds HUD icon to actor's unit display
behavior.on_removed: Removes HUD icon from actor's unit display
behavior.on_apply: Attempts dropoff at objective zone via TryDropOffObject, else spawns tile effect
behavior.on_death: Searches adjacent tiles (8 directions, then 2-tile radius) for valid drop location
behavior.on_use: Removes the skill from the actor
behavior.target_validation: Validates: no alive actor, no structure, not impassable/blocked, no existing recoverable object effect

handlers.name: RecoverableObjectTileEffectHandler
handlers.description: Tile effect representing a dropped recoverable object on the ground. Handles pickup logic when actors enter the tile.

tile_effect_fields.description: Reference to the tile this effect is placed on

tile_effect_fields.name: Template
tile_effect_fields.description: Template defining pickup behavior and granted skill

tile_effect_fields.name: AllowAllies
tile_effect_fields.description: If true, allied units can pick up this object (copied from handler)

tile_effect_fields.name: RecoverObjective
tile_effect_fields.description: Reference to the RecoverObject objective tracking this item (copied from handler)

template_fields.name: SkillToGrant
template_fields.description: Skill template granted to the picker (creates DropRecoverableObjectHandler)

template_fields.name: PickupSound
template_fields.description: Sound played when object is picked up

template_fields.name: CanPickupOnFoot
template_fields.description: If true, infantry units (mobility type 0) can pick up this object

template_fields.name: CanPickupInVehicle
template_fields.description: If true, vehicle units (mobility type 1) can pick up this object

behavior.can_pickup: Validates: actor has skill container, is alive, is player controlled or (AllowAllies && not allied). Checks mobility type against CanPickupOnFoot/CanPickupInVehicle.
behavior.try_pickup: Creates DropRecoverableObjectHandler skill from template, copies AllowAllies and RecoverObjective references, adds skill to actor, invokes OnSkillAdded, removes from objective tracking, removes tile effect.

key_discoveries.finding: Both handlers extend SkillEventHandler with +0x10=Skill reference and +0x18=EffectData pointer
Effect data at offset 0x58+ contains handler-specific configuration. EjectEntity has AllowRemount(bool) and RemountSkillTemplate. DropRecoverableObject has TileEffectTemplate and HUDIcon.

Complete pickup/drop cycle: RecoverableObjectTileEffectHandler.TryPickup creates DropRecoverableObjectHandler skill -> DropRecoverableObjectHandler.SpawnTileEffect creates new RecoverableObjectTileEffectHandler
AllowAllies and RecoverObjective references are copied between handlers and tile effects to maintain state across pickup/drop operations
OnDeath searches adjacent tiles in two passes: 8 cardinal/diagonal directions, then 2-tile radius using GetNextTile chains
RecoverableObjectTemplate has separate CanPickupOnFoot (0xC8) and CanPickupInVehicle (0xC9) flags for controlling which unit types can recover objects
RecoverObject objective (at handler+0x28) tracks progress via AddObject/RemoveObject and handles drop-off zone validation via TryDropOffObject
EjectEntityHandler grants RemountSkillTemplate (at EffectData+0x60) to ejected actors when AllowRemount is true, enabling vehicle re-entry

RecoverObject.description: Objective type tracking recoverable object collection
